list.title: QG-MIL: A Gated Transformer Aggregator for Domain-Agnostic Multiple Instance Learning in Medical Imaging

extra.desc: QG-MIL introduces a gated transformer aggregator for multiple instance learning in medical imaging that stabilizes attention distribution and improves prediction consistency across different medical domains.

list.title: EventVLA: Event-Driven Visual Evidence Memory for Long-Horizon Vision-Language-Action Policies

extra.desc: EventVLA addresses long-horizon robotic manipulation challenges by introducing a sparse visual evidence memory framework with visual anchors and dynamic Keyframe Evidence Memory module for improved task performance.

list.title: LingxiDiagBench: A Multi-Agent Framework for Benchmarking LLMs in Chinese Psychiatric Consultation and Diagnosis

extra.desc: A large-scale multi-agent benchmark for evaluating LLMs in Chinese psychiatric diagnosis is introduced, highlighting challenges in dynamic consultation and the gap between consultation quality and diagnostic accuracy.

list.title: FLAT: Feedforward Latent Triangle Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Scene Generation

extra.desc: Video diffusion models are adapted to decode explicit surface primitives directly from latent space, enabling high-quality 3D scene generation with improved geometric accuracy and real-time rendering capabilities.

list.title: AOHP: An Open-Source OS-Level Agent Harness for Personalized, Efficient and Secure Interaction

extra.desc: AOHP presents an Android-based operating system framework that treats AI agents as first-class entities, enhancing task completion rates and reducing execution costs through specialized agent-oriented mechanisms.

list.title: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning

extra.desc: EDV is a three-stage framework that uses multiple heterogeneous agents to collaboratively construct reliable experiences for LLM agents, preventing self-confirmatory errors through execute-distill-verify processes.

list.title: FlowR2A: Learning Reward-to-Action Distribution for Multimodal Driving Planning

extra.desc: FlowR2A addresses the tension in multimodal driving planning by combining dense reward supervision with dynamic proposal generation through a flow-matching decoder that learns reward-conditioned action distributions.

list.title: An Efficient Method for the Optimal Control of Microgrids Under Uncertainties using Local Reduction

extra.desc: Two mathematical formulations for robust microgrid sizing and power scheduling are proposed and compared, with one using binary variables and big-M constraints and the other using continuous nonlinear programming with smooth reformulation of logical constraints.

list.title: NatureBench: Can Coding Agents Match the Published SOTA of Nature-Family Papers?

extra.desc: NatureBench presents a cross-disciplinary benchmark of 90 scientific tasks derived from Nature publications to assess AI coding agents' ability to achieve discovery rather than just reproduction, revealing that current agents primarily rely on methodological translation rather than genuine scientific innovation.

list.title: DREAM: Dense Retrieval Embeddings via Autoregressive Modeling

extra.desc: DREAM trains dense retrieval embeddings using autoregressive language model attention mechanisms to supervise document-query similarity without requiring labeled examples.

list.title: FedOT: Ownership Verification and Leakage Tracing via Watermarks for Federated LDMs

extra.desc: FedOT is a novel framework that enables ownership verification and leakage tracing in federated latent diffusion models by introducing chunked watermarking and latent vector transformation to prevent watermark removal attacks.

list.title: ReMMD: Realistic Multilingual Multi-Image Agentic Verification for Multimodal Misinformation Detection

extra.desc: A comprehensive multimodal misinformation detection framework is introduced that handles complex, multilingual content with multiple images and diverse verification approaches, achieving superior performance while reducing computational costs.

list.title: Holistic Data Scheduler for LLM Pre-training via Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning

extra.desc: A novel online data mixing framework called Holistic Data Scheduler uses reinforcement learning with a multi-objective reward function to optimize large language model pre-training efficiency and performance.

list.title: Are Text-to-Image Models Inductivist Turkeys? A Counterfactual Benchmark for Causal Reasoning

extra.desc: Text-to-image models fail to generate counterfactual scenes because they rely on tightly coupled visual-textual patterns rather than causal reasoning, demonstrating limited understanding beyond pattern matching.

list.title: World Value Models for Robotic Manipulation

extra.desc: World Value Model combines world models with value estimation to provide accurate task progression assessment and improve robotic policy learning from mixed-quality data.

list.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents

extra.desc: Language-based world models enable agentic environment simulation across multiple domains and enhance general agent performance through scalable simulation and improved downstream task performance.

list.title: MemGUI-Agent: An End-to-End Long-Horizon Mobile GUI Agent with Proactive Context Management

extra.desc: MemGUI-Agent addresses long-horizon mobile GUI task limitations through proactive context management using Context-as-Action (ConAct) to maintain critical information across extended sequences.

list.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models

extra.desc: An open-source data curation pipeline for training agentic language models is presented, demonstrating superior performance through systematic experimentation and scalable training data.

list.title: FLUX3D: High-Fidelity 3D Gaussian Generation with Diffusion-Aligned Sparse Representation

extra.desc: FLUX3D addresses limitations in image-to-3D Gaussian Splatting generation by improving representation learning and cross-modal alignment through specialized architectures and attention mechanisms.

list.title: MobileForge: Annotation-Free Adaptation for Mobile GUI Agents with Hierarchical Feedback-Guided Policy Optimization

extra.desc: MobileForge enables efficient adaptation of mobile GUI agents through annotation-free learning by combining real app interaction grounding with hierarchical feedback-guided policy optimization.

list.title: DiffusionBench: On Holistic Evaluation of Diffusion Transformers

extra.desc: Researchers introduce NanoGen, a unified framework for training and evaluating diffusion transformers that demonstrates the need for comprehensive benchmarking beyond ImageNet class-conditional generation to assess true progress in generative modeling.

list.title: Beyond Reward Engineering: A Data Recipe for Long-Context Reinforcement Learning

extra.desc: Data-centric approach using curated datasets and minimal GRPO setup significantly improves long-context reasoning in large language models, outperforming prior reinforcement learning methods.

list.title: TROPT: An Open Framework for Unifying and Advancing Discrete Text Optimization

extra.desc: A unified open-source framework for discrete text-trigger optimization that standardizes the development and execution of optimization strategies across various domains and applications.

list.title: Lift4D: Harmonizing Single-View 3D Estimation for 4D Reconstruction In-the-Wild

extra.desc: Lift4D presents a test-time optimization framework that combines temporal consistency from single-view 3D reconstruction with deformable 3D Gaussian Splatting and view-conditioned diffusion priors to reconstruct dynamic non-rigid objects from monocular video.

list.title: Comparing Linear Probes with Mahalanobis Cosine Similarity

extra.desc: The Mahalanobis cosine similarity provides a theoretically grounded method for comparing linear probes that correlates strongly with out-of-distribution performance metrics.

list.title: ShotcreteDepth: A Bi-modal Dataset for Robust Robotic Depth Perception in Shotcrete Construction Environments

extra.desc: A bi-modal construction domain dataset combining stereo RGB and LiDAR data under challenging environmental conditions is introduced for autonomous system perception research.

list.title: When Agents Commit Too Soon: Diagnosing Premature Commitment in LLM Agents

extra.desc: Pre premature commitment in long-horizon LLM agents leads to silent failures where agents defend early interpretations without considering alternatives, and hidden-state convergence serves as an early diagnostic for trajectory consistency.

list.title: Go-with-the-Track: Video Compositing and Motion Control with Point Tracking

extra.desc: Go-with-the-Track unifies motion control and reference image compositing in video generation by using point-track embeddings with spatial-aware encoding and video diffusion transformers.

list.title: Libretto: Giving LLM Agents a Sense of Musical Structure

extra.desc: Libretto provides a structured framework for symbolic music generation and revision using LLM-native grammar and statistical evaluation across musical dimensions.

list.title: A Verifiable Search Is Not a Learnable Chain-of-Thought

extra.desc: Training models on chain-of-thought demonstrations fails for tasks requiring backtracking search because the forward derivation cannot be faithfully imitated, demonstrating a fundamental limitation in learning search procedures through demonstration.

list.title: Vera: A Layered Diffusion Model for Content-Preserving Video Editing

extra.desc: Vera is a layered diffusion framework that preserves video content during editing by generating edit layers and alpha mattes through a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture.

list.title: Robusto-2: Benchmarking Humans & VLMs for Autonomous Driving in Lima & New York City

extra.desc: Research examines how self-driving car systems and humans perform on visual question answering tasks across different geographic locations, revealing that both human and AI responses diverge based on question types but show similar performance regardless of location.

list.title: An Exploratory Case Study of LLM-Assisted Refactoring and Gameplay Feature Generation in an Endless Runner Game

extra.desc: Large language models demonstrate varying effectiveness in software development tasks, successfully completing localized refactoring but showing limitations in integrating new gameplay features within existing game systems.

list.title: AC-ODM: Actor--Critic Online Data Mixing for Sample-Efficient LLM Pretraining

extra.desc: AC-ODM optimizes pretraining data composition for LLMs using reinforcement learning to improve convergence speed and downstream accuracy while maintaining computational efficiency.

list.title: Toward Parking Spot Occupancy Recognition: A Self-Supervised Approach

extra.desc: A self-supervised transfer learning approach for parking spot occupancy recognition that achieves high accuracy with minimal labeled data through two-stage training and deployment strategies.

list.title: Capable but Careless: Do Computer-Use Agents Follow Contextual Integrity?

extra.desc: Computer-use agents frequently expose inappropriate information across applications, prompting the creation of AgentCIBench to evaluate and mitigate privacy risks in cross-application contexts.

list.title: Demystifying Training-Time Augmentation for Data-Constrained Language Model Pretraining

extra.desc: Training-time data augmentation techniques help mitigate overfitting in autoregressive language model pretraining by delaying performance deterioration and improving final model quality when training on fixed datasets for many epochs.

list.title: Toward Open Weight Models Without Risks: Separating Public and Private Capabilities in LLMs

extra.desc: Tiered Language Models (TLMs) provide a framework for releasing large language models with configurable capability levels through secret keys that modify computation graphs while maintaining public model integrity.

list.title: Arbor: Explicit Geometric Conditioning for Controllable 3D Asset Generation

extra.desc: Arbor enables explicit 3D spatial control in text-conditioned latent generation through constraint meshes that define occupancy, avoidance, and contact regions, maintaining object quality while improving constraint adherence.

list.title: Grouped Query Experts: Mixture-of-Experts on GQA Self-Attention

extra.desc: Grouped Query Experts (GQE) improves Transformer efficiency by selectively activating query heads based on token content while maintaining key-value cache benefits of grouped-query attention.

list.title: Counsel: A Meta-Evaluation Dataset for Agentic Tasks

list.title: Notes2Skills: From Lab Notebooks to Certainty-Aware Scientific Agent Skills

extra.desc: Notes2Skills framework converts laboratory notes into verifiable skills for AI agents while maintaining author uncertainty levels, addressing gaps in scientific AI development.

list.title: BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language

extra.desc: BioMatrix is a novel multimodal foundation model that integrates molecular sequences, structures, and natural language into a unified decoder-only architecture for diverse biological tasks.

list.title: SkillHarness: Harnessing Safe Skills for Computer-Use Agents

list.title: Improving Text-to-Music Generation with Human Preference Rewards

list.title: Deeper is Not Always Better: Mitigating the Alignment Tax via Confident Layer Decoding

list.title: HAKARI-Bench: A Lightweight Benchmark for Comparing Retrieval Architectures and Efficiency Settings under Unified Conditions
